query:
INSERT INTO appAccounts (appKey, appName, appUrl, signupUrl, emoji, category, isPaid, hasFamilyTier, sortOrder, notes, createdAt)
VALUES (
  'education_com',
  'Education.com',
  'https://www.education.com',
  'https://www.education.com/join/',
  '🏫',
  'learning',
  0,
  1,
  15,
  'Worksheets, games, and activities for K-8. Sign in with Google (spear.cpt@gmail.com). Free tier includes printable worksheets and online games.',
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  appName = VALUES(appName),
  appUrl = VALUES(appUrl),
  signupUrl = VALUES(signupUrl),
  emoji = VALUES(emoji),
  notes = VALUES(notes);
